name: BTC Miner
summary: A real self-custodial Bitcoin wallet and live network view, entirely in your browser.

description.p: Holding real Bitcoin shouldn't mean trusting a custodian or installing software.
Real secp256k1 keys and bech32 addresses are generated and signed on-device with audited cryptography, against the live Bitcoin network.

ul: Self-custodial keys, generated and signed on-device
Send and receive real BTC on the live network

releases.description: BrowserCoin experience for real BTC: a real self-custodial wallet (secp256k1/bech32, testnet-first send/receive) + live network + prism-κ-verified blocks.
